description: Template for reviewed, non-destructive sandbox HTTP validation probes.

cases.title: Input handling injection sweep
cases.manual_verification: Compare baseline and mutated responses. File a bug if mutation changes authorization scope, exposes SQL/framework errors, reflects executable content, or shows evidence of unsafe query construction.
cases.notes: Replace the path with a sandbox endpoint that is approved for input validation testing.

cases.title: Debug or stack-trace exposure probe
cases.manual_verification: Confirm whether the response or server logs expose a stack trace, framework debugger, environment detail, or sensitive implementation detail.
cases.notes: Replace the path with a sandbox-only route that is approved for error-handling validation.

cases.title: Authorization boundary probe for cross-record access
cases.manual_verification: Run with a sandbox user who must not access the record. File a bug if the response exposes record data or confirms unauthorized access.
cases.notes: Use only synthetic sandbox records and accounts created for authorization testing.
